economic_notes: Subsidiaries include Metepenagiag Heritage Park Inc., 651738 N.B. Ltd. (Riverside Entertainment Centre), Metepenagiag Economic Ventures Corporation, Metepenagiag Moncton Lands 1 Corporation and Metepenagiag Moncton Lands 2 Corporation. notes: Consolidated entity includes 5 subsidiaries (4 corporations plus Heritage Park Inc.). Net debt position of $18.45M. Restricted CMHC funds total $96,099 (Operating $2,284 + Reserve $93,815). Total government transfers calculated as federal operating $8,242,337 + federal capital $2,663,403 + provincial operating $4,100,386 = $13,005,726. Remuneration schedule referenced pages 27-28 but detail not extracted from available images. Expenses for lands and trusts $868,261 and economic development $596,828 and other $11,870,256 not mapped to standard categories.
